bns[cin[1]]=bns[cio[1]][bns[cip[1]]];local cir=cin[2] local cis=bmt[ciq[2]] local cit=bns[cir] local ciu=cit[cis] bns[cir]=ciu(cit) else local civ=bnn[bnj] local ciw=bnn[bni] local cix=bnn[bnm] bns[civ[1]]=bmn[bmt[ciw[1]]];bns[civ[2]]=bmt[ciw[2]];bns[civ[3]]=bns[ciw[3]][bns[cix[3]]];bns[civ[4]]=bmt[ciw[4]];end end end else if bof<=213 then if bof<=212 then if bof<=210 then local ciy=bnn local ciz=ciy[bnj][1] local cja,cjb,cjc=bns[ciz],bns[ciz+1],bns[ciz+bn[37][5]] bns[ciz]=k(function() for cjd,cje in cja,cjb,cjc do j(true,cjd,cje) end end) boe=ciz+bn[37][5] while true do local cjf,cjg,cjh=bns[ciz]() if not cjf then break end do local cji,cjj=cjg,cjh bns[ciz+bn[39][4]]=cji bns[ciz+bn[43][6]]=cjj end bns[ciy[bnj][2]]=bns[ciy[bni][2]] local cjk,cjl=bns[ciy[bni][3]],ciy[bnj][3];bns[cjl+1]=cjk;bns[cjl]=cjk[bmt[ciy[bnm][3]]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[ciy[bnj][4]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[ciy[bnj][5]] local cjm=ciy[bnj][6] local cjn=boc[bnr] local cjo=boc[bnr-1] bnr=bnr-bn[37][5] cjo(cjn) end bok=ciy[bni][1] else cg=bnn[bnl] local cjp=cq(cf) local cjq=cq(cf) local cjr=cq(cf) bns[cjp][bns[cjq]]=bns[cjr];end else bns[bnn[bnj]]=bns[bnn[bnm]]==bns[bnn[bni]];end else if bof<=215 then if bof<=214 then local cjs=bnn local cjt=cjs[bnj][1] local cju=cjs[bnm][1] local cjv,cjw,cjx=bns[cjt],bns[cjt+1],bns[cjt+bn[37][5]] while cjv<=cjw do bns[cjt]=cjv bns[cjt+bn[39][4]]=cjv bns[cjs[bnj][2]]=bns[cjs[bni][2]] local cjy,cjz=bns[cjs[bni][3]],cjs[bnj][3];bns[cjz+1]=cjy;bns[cjz]=cjy[bmt[cjs[bnm][3]]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cjs[bnj][4]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cjs[bnj][5]] bns[cjs[bnj][6]]=bmt[cjs[bni][6]] bnv=bns[cjs[bnj][7]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv local cka=cjs[bnj][9] local ckb=boc[bnr] local ckc=boc[bnr-1] local ckd=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] bnr=bnr-bn[39][4] bns[cka]=ckd(ckc,ckb) bns[cjs[bnj][10]]=bns[cjs[bni][10]] local cke,ckf=bns[cjs[bni][11]],cjs[bnj][11];bns[ckf+1]=cke;bns[ckf]=cke[bmt[cjs[bnm][11]]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cjs[bnj][12]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cjs[bnj][13]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cjs[bnj][14]] bns[cjs[bnj][15]]={} bns[cjs[bnj][16]]=bmt[cjs[bni][16]] bns[cjs[bnj][17]][bns[cjs[bni][17]]]=bns[cjs[bnm][17]] bns[cjs[bnj][18]]=bmt[cjs[bni][18]] bns[cjs[bnj][19]]={} bns[cjs[bnj][20]][bns[cjs[bni][20]]]=bns[cjs[bnm][20]] bns[cjs[bnj][21]]=bmt[cjs[bni][21]] bns[cjs[bnj][22]]=bns[cjs[bni][22]][bns[cjs[bnm][22]]] bns[cjs[bnj][23]][bns[cjs[bni][23]]]=bns[cjs[bnm][23]] bns[cjs[bnj][24]]=bmt[cjs[bni][24]] bns[cjs[bnj][25]][bns[cjs[bni][25]]]=bns[cjs[bnm][25]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cjs[bnj][26]] local ckg=boc[bnr] local ckh=boc[bnr-1] local cki=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] local ckj=boc[bnr-bn[39][4]] bnr=bnr-bn[43][6] ckj(cki,ckh,ckg) cjv=cjv+cjx end bns[cjt]=cjv bok=cjs[bni][1] else local ckk=bnn local ckl=ckk[bnj][1] local ckm=ckk[bnm][1] local ckn,cko,ckp=bns[ckl],bns[ckl+1],bns[ckl+bn[37][5]] while ckn<=cko do bns[ckl]=ckn bns[ckl+bn[39][4]]=ckn bns[ckk[bnj][2]]=bmn[bmt[ckk[bni][2]]] bnv=bns[ckk[bnj][3]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv bns[ckk[bnj][5]]=bns[ckk[bni][5]] bnv=bns[ckk[bnj][6]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv local ckq=ckk[bnj][8] local ckr=boc[bnr] local cks=boc[bnr-1] bnr=bnr-bn[37][5] cks(ckr) bns[ckk[bnj][9]]=bmn[bmt[ckk[bni][9]]] bns[ckk[bnj][10]]=bmt[ckk[bni][10]] bns[ckk[bnj][11]]=bns[ckk[bni][11]][bns[ckk[bnm][11]]] bnv=bns[ckk[bnj][12]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv local ckt ckt=bmt[ckk[bni][14]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=ckt local cku=ckk[bnj][15] local ckv=boc[bnr] local ckw=boc[bnr-1] bnr=bnr-bn[37][5] ckw(ckv) ckn=ckn+ckp end bns[ckl]=ckn bok=ckk[bni][1] end else if bof<=216 then local ckx=bmq[bok+1] local cky=bmq[bok+bn[37][5]] local ckz=bmq[bok+bn[39][4]] local cla=bu(ckx[bni],bok+bn[30]) local clb=bu(cky[bni],cla) bns[bnn[bnj]]=bmt[bnn[bni]];bnv=bns[ckx[bnj]] bnv=bnv*bns[clb] bns[ckz[bnj]]=bnv bok=bok+bn[39][4] else local clc=bnn[bnj] local cld=bnn[bni] local cle=bnn[bnm] bns[clc[1]]=bmt[cld[1]];bns[clc[2]]=bns[cld[2]]==bns[cle[2]];end end end end end else if bof<=257 then if bof<=249 then if bof<=245 then if bof<=243 then if bof>=243 then bns[bmq[bok][bnj]]=bns[bmq[bok][bni]]>=bns[bmq[bok][bnm]];else local clf=bmu[bnn[bnl]] local clg=clf[1]-1 local clh=boc[bnr] local cli=boc[bnr-1] bnr=bnr-bn[37][5] do local clj,clk,cll=cli(clh) bns[clg]=clj bns[clg+1]=clk bns[clg+bn[37][5]]=cll end end else if bof<=244 then local clm=bnn[bnj] local cln=bnn[bni] bof>=249 then local clp=bnn local clq=clp[bnj][1] local clr=clp[bnm][1] local cls,clt,clu=bns[clq],bns[clq+1],bns[clq+bn[37][5]] while cls<=clt do bns[clq]=cls bns[clq+bn[39][4]]=cls bns[clp[bnj][2]]=bns[clp[bni][2]] local clv,clw=bns[clp[bni][3]],clp[bnj][3];bns[clw+1]=clv;bns[clw]=clv[bmt[clp[bnm][3]]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[clp[bnj][4]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[clp[bnj][5]] bns[clp[bnj][6]]=bmt[clp[bni][6]] bnv=bns[clp[bnj][7]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv local clx=clp[bnj][9] local cly=boc[bnr] local clz=boc[bnr-1] local cma=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] bnr=bnr-bn[39][4] bns[clx]=cma(clz,cly) bns[clp[bnj][10]]=bns[clp[bni][10]] local cmb,cmc=bns[clp[bni][11]],clp[bnj][11];bns[cmc+1]=cmb;bns[cmc]=cmb[bmt[clp[bnm][11]]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[clp[bnj][12]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[clp[bnj][13]] bnv=bns[clp[bnj][14]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv bns[clp[bnj][16]]={} bns[clp[bnj][17]]=bmt[clp[bni][17]] bns[clp[bnj][18]][bns[clp[bni][18]]]=bns[clp[bnm][18]] bns[clp[bnj][23]]=bns[clp[bni][23]][bns[clp[bnm][23]]] bns[clp[bnj][24]][bns[clp[bni][24]]]=bns[clp[bnm][24]] bns[clp[bnj][25]]=bmt[clp[bni][25]] bns[clp[bnj][26]][bns[clp[bni][26]]]=bns[clp[bnm][26]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[clp[bnj][27]] local cmd=boc[bnr] local cme=boc[bnr-1] local cmf=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] local cmg=boc[bnr-bn[39][4]] bnr=bnr-bn[43][6] cmg(cmf,cme,cmd) cls=cls+clu end bns[clq]=cls bok=clp[bni][1] else if not(bns[bnn[bnj]]~=nil and bns[bnn[bnj]]~=false) then bok=bmq[bok][bni];end;end else if bof<=246 then local cmh=bnn local cmi=cmh[bnj][1] local cmj=cmh[bnm][1] local cmk,cml,cmm=bns[cmi],bns[cmi+1],bns[cmi+bn[37][5]] while cmk<=cml do bns[cmi]=cmk bns[cmi+bn[39][4]]=cmk bns[cmh[bnj][2]]=bns[cmh[bni][2]] local cmn,cmo=bns[cmh[bni][3]],cmh[bnj][3];bns[cmo+1]=cmn;bns[cmo]=cmn[bmt[cmh[bnm][3]]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cmh[bnj][4]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cmh[bnj][5]] local cmp cmp=bmt[cmh[bni][6]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=cmp local cmq=cmh[bnj][7] local cmr=boc[bnr] local cms=boc[bnr-1] local cmt=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] bnr=bnr-bn[39][4] bns[cmq]=cmt(cms,cmr) bns[cmh[bnj][8]]=bns[cmh[bni][8]] local cmu,cmv=bns[cmh[bni][9]],cmh[bnj][9];bns[cmv+1]=cmu;bns[cmv]=cmu[bmt[cmh[bnm][9]]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cmh[bnj][10]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cmh[bnj][11]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cmh[bnj][12]] bns[cmh[bnj][13]]={} bns[cmh[bnj][14]]=bmt[cmh[bni][14]] bns[cmh[bnj][15]][bns[cmh[bni][15]]]=bns[cmh[bnm][15]] bns[cmh[bnj][16]]=bmt[cmh[bni][16]] bns[cmh[bnj][17]]={} bns[cmh[bnj][18]][bns[cmh[bni][18]]]=bns[cmh[bnm][18]] bns[cmh[bnj][19]]=bmt[cmh[bni][19]] bns[cmh[bnj][20]]=bns[cmh[bni][20]][bns[cmh[bnm][20]]] bns[cmh[bnj][21]][bns[cmh[bni][21]]]=bns[cmh[bnm][21]] bns[cmh[bnj][22]]=bmt[cmh[bni][22]] bns[cmh[bnj][23]][bns[cmh[bni][23]]]=bns[cmh[bnm][23]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cmh[bnj][24]] local cmw=boc[bnr] local cmx=boc[bnr-1] local cmy=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] local cmz=boc[bnr-bn[39][4]] bnr=bnr-bn[43][6] cmz(cmy,cmx,cmw) cmk=cmk+cmm end bns[cmi]=cmk bok=cmh[bni][1] else cg=bnn[bnl] local cna=cq(cf) local cnb=cq(cf) local cnc=cq(cf) bns[cna]=bns[cnb][bns[cnc]];end end end else if bof<=253 then if bof>=252 then if bof>=253 then if bnn[bnj]~=121 then local cnd=bmq[bns[bnn[bnm]]] local cne,cnf=cnd[bni],cnd[bnj] cnd[bnj]=cne cnd[bni]=cnf bnn[bnj]=121 end else local cng=bnn local cnh=cng[bnj][1] local cni=cng[bnm][1] local cnj,cnk,cnl=bns[cnh],bns[cnh+1],bns[cnh+bn[37][5]] while cnj<=cnk do bns[cnh]=cnj bnv=bns[cng[bnj][6]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv local cno cno=bmt[cng[bni][8]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=cno local cnp=cng[bnj][9] local cnq=boc[bnr] local cnr=boc[bnr-1] local cns=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] bnr=bnr-bn[39][4] bns[cnp]=cns(cnr,cnq) bns[cng[bnj][10]]=bns[cng[bni][10]] local cnt,cnu=bns[cng[bni][11]],cng[bnj][11];bns[cnu+1]=cnt;bns[cnu]=cnt[bmt[cng[bnm][11]]] bnv=bns[cng[bnj][12]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bnv bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cng[bnj][14]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cng[bnj][15]] bns[cng[bnj][16]]={} bns[cng[bnj][17]]=bmt[cng[bni][17]] bns[cng[bnj][18]][bns[cng[bni][18]]]=bns[cng[bnm][18]] bnr=bnr+1 boc[bnr]=bns[cng[bnj][27]] local cnv=boc[bnr] local cnw=boc[bnr-1] local cnx=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] local cny=boc[bnr-bn[39][4]] bnr=bnr-bn[43][6] cny(cnx,cnw,cnv) cnj=cnj+cnl end bns[cnh]=cnj bok=cng[bni][1] end else if bof>=251 then cg=bnn[bnl] local cnz=cq(cf) local coa=cq(cf) local cob=cq(cf) bns[cnz]=bns[coa][bns[cob]];else local coc=boc[bnr] local cod=boc[bnr-1] local coe=boc[bnr-bn[37][5]] bnr=bnr-bn[39][4] bns[bnn[bnj]]=coe(cod,coc) end end else if bof<=bn[37][3] then if bof<=254 then if bnn[bnj]~=162 then local cof=bmq[bns[bnn[bnm]]] local cog,coh=cof[bni],cof[bnj] cof[bnj]=cog cof[bni]=coh bnn[bnj]=162 end else if bnn[bnj]~=89 then local coi=bmq[bns[bnn[bnl]]] local coj,cok,col=coi[bni],coi[bnj],coi[bnm] coi[bnj]=coj coi[bni]=cok coi[bnm]=col bnn[bnj]=89 end end else if bof>=257 then local com=boc[bnr] bnr=bnr-1 bns[bnn[bnj]]=com() else if bnn[bni]~=184 then local con=bmq[bns[bnn[bnl]]] local coo,cop,coq=con[bni],con[bnj],con[bnm] con[bnj]=coo con[bni]=cop con[bnm]=coq bnn[bni]=184 end end end end end else if bof<=265 then if bof<=261 then if bof>=260 then if bof<=260 then bns[bnn[bni]]=bnn[bnj];else cg=bnn[bnl] local cor=cq(cf) local cos=cq(cf) local cot=cq(cf) bns[cor][bns[cos]]=bns[cot];end else if bof<=258 then local cou=bnn[bnj] local cov=bnn[bni] bns[cou[1]]=bmt[cov[1]];bns[cou[2]]=bmn[bmt[cov[2]]];bns[cou[3]]=bmt[cov[3]];else if bnn[bnj]~=197 then local cow=bmq[bns[bnn[bnl]]] local cox,coy,coz=cow[bnm],cow[bnj],cow[bni] cow[bnj]=cox local cpb=bnn[bnj] local cpc=bnn[bni] local cpd=bnn[bnm] bns[cpb[1]]=bmt[cpc[1]];bns[cpb[2]]=bns[cpc[2]][bns[cpd[2]]];end else if bof<=262 then cg=bnn[bnl] local cpe=cq(cf) local cpf=cq(cf) local if bof>=294 then if bof<=294 then bns[bnn[bnj]]=bmt[bnn[bni]];else if bof<=295 then bns[bnn[bnj]]=bns[bnn[bni]];else if bof<=296 then cg=bnn[bnl] local cpz=cq(cf) local cqa=cq(cf) local cqb=cq(cf) bns[cqc][bns[cqd]]=bns[cqe];else if bof<=300 then bns[bnn[bnj]]=bns[bnn[bnj]]();else if bof<=301 then cg=bnn[bnl] local cqf=cq(cf) local cqg=cq(cf) local cqh=cq(cf) bns[cqf]=bns[cqg][bns[cqh]];else if drk=function(dro,drp,drq) drj[dro*131071+drm]=((dro-drq)+drp)+drm return drj[dro*131071+drm] end drl=0 dri=drl drm=drl drm=drm*28+(64876) dri=dri+(drj[148061*131071+drm] or drk(148061,1117,3870)) repeat if dri<=545699 then if dri<545699 then if dri==210184 then drn=drh-drg+1 if drn>bn[43][1] then drm=drm*13+(-793916) drl=dri+(drj[333954*131071+drm] or drk(333954,2403,1875)) dri=drl else drm=drm*31+(-1988838) dri=dri+(drj[313406*131071+drm] or drk(313406,3393,3602)) end else drm=0 dri=594174 end else if dri==545699 then return s(drf,drg,drh) else drm=0 dri=594174 end end else if dri==594174 then drl=drj[drm*131071+41] or dri dri=drl[10637] elseif dri==594138 then return bs(drf,drg,drh) else drm=0 dri=594174 end end until dri==473607 end bl=bl*15+(-34475) bh=bh+(bi[13*131071+bl] or bj(13)) else bl=0 bh=1246 end end end else bl=0 bh=1246 end else bl=0 bh=1246 end end else if bh<=1002 then if bh<=768 then if bh>=765 then if bh<=768 then if bh==765 then bn[36][6]=rawset bl=bl*15+(-886619) bh=bh+(bi[26*131071+bl] or bj(26)) elseif bh==768 then bn[22][6]=(bn[16][6])-(32553005) cc=setfenv bn[22][5]=(bn[43][7])-(54650606)
